name: @artshin/perf-recorder-workspace
description: Monorepo for the perf-recorder Expo native module and its Rozenite DevTools panel.

scripts.build: yarn workspace @artshin/expo-perf-recorder build && yarn workspace @artshin/rozenite-perf-recorder build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @artshin/expo-perf-recorder build && yarn workspace @artshin/rozenite-perf-recorder typecheck
scripts.lint: yarn workspace @artshin/expo-perf-recorder lint && yarn workspace @artshin/rozenite-perf-recorder lint
